hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(^|/)(\.|)env(\.|$|/)|(\.github|/\.github)'; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "🔒 Access denied: .env and .github files are protected (contain credentials). Credentials must remain in these files but never be read."}'; else echo '{"continue": true}'; fi; }
